inputs.label: Product Weight
inputs.businessContext: ISO 14040:2006 Life cycle assessment principles and framework. Weight of the product unit.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: ISO 14067:2018 Carbon footprint of products. Different materials have different emission factors.

inputs.label: Emission Factor (Material)
inputs.businessContext: IPCC Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories. Default factors for material production.

inputs.label: Production Energy
inputs.businessContext: ISO 50001 Energy management. Energy consumed during manufacturing per unit product.

inputs.label: Grid Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: IEA data or national grid emission factors. Used to convert electricity to emissions.

inputs.label: Transport Distance
inputs.businessContext: ISO 14083:2023 Greenhouse gas emissions from transport chains. Distance from production to customer.

inputs.label: Transport Mode
inputs.businessContext: Different modes have different emission factors per tonne-km (e.g., DEFRA conversion factors).

inputs.label: Emission Factor (Transport)
inputs.businessContext: DEFRA or IPCC emission factors for freight transport.

inputs.label: Use Phase Energy
inputs.businessContext: Energy consumed during product use over its lifetime. Relevant for energy-using products.

inputs.label: Use Phase Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Same as grid emission factor or specific fuel emission factor.

inputs.label: End-of-Life Recycling Rate
inputs.businessContext: ISO 14044:2006 Life cycle assessment. Recycling reduces net emissions.

inputs.label: Recycling Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Emissions from recycling process per kg of material.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Subjective assessment of input data quality. Affects confidence adjustment.

thresholds.materialCarbonFootprint: > 500: 'Material emissions are high, consider alternative materials'
thresholds.energyCarbonFootprint: > 300: 'Production energy emissions are high, improve energy efficiency'

suggestedActions: Use recycled materials to reduce material emissions
Optimize logistics to reduce transport distance
